home.hero_title: We integrate technology to protect people
home.hero_subtitle: Unified systems for video surveillance, drones, facial recognition and smart dispatch — because citizen security demands efficiency, not just equipment.
home.featured_title: Technology that protects what matters most
home.featured_innovation_desc: Unified platforms integrating video, access control, facial recognition and license plate readers into a single control center.
home.featured_support_desc: Operations center available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, with long-term maintenance contracts.
home.featured_results_desc: Over 60% market share in public video surveillance in Chile, with nationwide presence across all regions.

products.title: Our Solutions
products.subtitle: State-of-the-art technology for public, industrial and corporate security
products.p1_desc: HD, thermal and military-grade camera systems with AI video analytics for early incident detection and real-time monitoring.
products.p2_desc: Multi-system management software integrating video, access control, intrusion and dispatch into a single operations console.
products.p3_desc: Intelligent portals for automatic plate recognition with direct integration to Carabineros databases and national vehicle registry.
products.p4_desc: Real-time biometric identification systems integrated with PDI databases and law enforcement agencies.

innovation.title: Technology & Innovation
innovation.subtitle: We integrate the world's best technologies to build safer cities
innovation.rd_desc: Artificial intelligence algorithms for behavior detection, people counting, license plate recognition and real-time risk situation analysis.
innovation.ai_desc: Smart city platforms integrating surveillance, traffic management, access control and police dispatch in a unified ecosystem.
innovation.cloud_desc: Fiber optic networks, long-range P2P and P2MP wireless links (up to 80 km), MPLS and redundancy for uninterrupted critical operations.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: Updates from Visionaria and the security technology world

support.title: Technical Support
support.subtitle: Operations center available 7×24×365 for all our systems
support.docs_desc: Manuals, schematics and configuration guides for all Visionaria systems.
support.ticket_desc: Report a fault or request technical intervention. Response time guaranteed by contract.
support.community_desc: Direct assistance from our engineers specialized in electronic security and systems integration.
support.status_desc: Real-time monitoring of the operational status of all your installed systems.
